mapper.select: SELECT USERID ,PASSWD ,USERNAME ,EMAIL ,UPOINT ,TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD')REGDATE FROM TUSER ORDER BY USERID ASC
SELECT USERID ,PASSWD ,USERNAME ,EMAIL ,UPOINT ,REGDATE FROM TUSER WHERE USERID = #{userid}
SELECT USERID ,PASSWD ,USERNAME ,EMAIL ,UPOINT ,TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD')REGDATE FROM TUSER WHERE USERID = #{userid}
